prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-REAGANKNIFE-GLD Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Gold Finish Pocket Knife Reagan Bush '84 Design Window Punch Cutter Description: Be prepared for any situation with the ASR Outdoor Gold Finish Pocket Knife.

This pocket knife boasts the logo from President Reagan and Bush's campaign run in 1984. It has a classic tanto blade constructed of gold finish durable stainless steel that wont rust, so you can count on it rain or shine. The handle has a comfortable ergonomic grip to prevent slippage during use, and also features a window punch as well as a seat belt cutter in case of an auto emergency.

The knife unfolds to an overall length of 8", the blade is 3" and it folds to a compact 4.5". The backside of the knife comes with a sturdy pocket clip, making it a great every day carry tool. The thumb assist open will ensure that you can quickly and safely open the knife in a pinch. This is a must-have knife for Reagan/Bush fans and knife collectors alike. Search Terms: hunting knives every day carry multi tool steel blades window punch seat belt cutter camping survival emergency preparedness Features: - REAGAN BUSH '84 DESIGN - Featuring Logo from Reagan's Presidential Campaign from 1984 | Must Have for Collectors and History Buffs - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - 3CR13 Stainless Steel Will Not Rust | Cool Gold Finish for Unique Look - TANTO POINT BLADE - Easy to Sharpen and Strong Design | Ideal Every Day Carry Tool | Overall Length 8", Blade Length 3", Folds to Compact 4.5" - SURVIVAL MULTI TOOL - Doubles as Seat Belt Cutter and Window Breaker In Case of Auto Emergency - ERGONOMIC HANDLE - Thumb Assist Open and Comfortable Grip Prevents Slippage During Use | Sturdy Pocket Clip === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Gold Finish Reagan Bush '84 Pocket Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Tanto Blade, Window Punch, Seat Belt Cutter, Thumb Assist, Ergonomic Grip, Compact 45 Inch
